metadata.title: States PCS: Mizoram GK for Mizoram PSC Exams

questions.question: Which traditional shifting cultivation practice is commonly followed by the hill tribes of Mizoram?
questions.explanation: Jhum cultivation involves clearing forest land for crops, widely used by Mizoram tribes; it’s a form of shifting agriculture common to Northeast India.

questions.question: Which wildlife sanctuary in Mizoram is renowned for its population of hoolock gibbons?
questions.explanation: Dampa Wildlife Sanctuary in western Mizoram is notable for its significant hoolock gibbon population and rich biodiversity.

questions.question: Which traditional Mizo belief system promotes the conservation of forests through the maintenance of sacred groves?
questions.explanation: Mizo Animism involved worshipping nature deities and preserving sacred groves, aiding forest conservation before Christianity’s spread.
